entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop studied for the inheritance of seed size

entities.name: CICER ARIETINUM
entities.description: The scientific name for chickpea

entities.name: SEED SIZE
entities.description: The physical size of the seeds, measured in grams per 100 seeds

entities.name: COMPLETE DIALLEL CROSS
entities.description: A breeding method used to study the inheritance of seed size by crossing all possible parent combinations

entities.name: TEL HADYA
entities.description: The specific site in Syria where the research was conducted

entities.name: SYRIA
entities.description: The country where the research was conducted

entities.name: COMBINING ABILITY ANALYSIS
entities.description: An analysis used to evaluate the breeding value of parents for seed size

entities.name: GENERATION MEAN ANALYSIS
entities.description: An analysis used to estimate gene effects and detect epistasis

entities.name: ADDITIVE GENE EFFECTS
entities.description: The cumulative effect of individual alleles on the seed size trait

entities.name: NON-ADDITIVE GENE EFFECTS
entities.description: Gene effects resulting from dominance or epistasis affecting seed size

entities.name: ADDITIVE GENE ACTION
entities.description: The action of genes where the effect of alleles is additive, found to be preponderant for seed size

entities.name: PARTIAL DOMINANCE
entities.description: A condition where small seed size is partially dominant over large seed size

entities.name: RECESSIVE GENES
entities.description: Genes that govern seed size, suggesting large seed size is dominant or small is recessive

entities.name: BACKCROSS
entities.description: A breeding method suggested to enhance the chances of large-seeded segregants

entities.name: EPISTASIS
entities.description: The interaction between different genes affecting seed size

entities.name: ADDITIVE X ADDITIVE EFFECTS
entities.description: A specific type of epistatic interaction noticed in 6 crosses

entities.name: ADDITIVE X DOMINANCE EFFECTS
entities.description: A specific type of epistatic interaction noticed in 4 crosses

entities.name: DOMINANCE X DOMINANCE EFFECTS
entities.description: A specific type of epistatic interaction noticed in 6 crosses

entities.name: NARROW-SENSE HERITABILITY
entities.description: The proportion of phenotypic variance due to additive genetic variance for seed size

entities.name: GENIC INTERACTIONS
entities.description: Interactions between genes that played a significant role in seed size inheritance

entities.name: BULK-PEDIGREE METHOD
entities.description: A selection method suggested for the improvement of seed size in chickpea
